ABOUT.HERO_TITLE: A company built on experience, growth and vision
ABOUT.HERO_PARAGRAPH: Guri Group Impresa, officially established in 2023, has its roots in the early 2000s as a construction company specialized in building works.
ABOUT.INTRO_PARAGRAPH1: Over the years, the company has expanded its expertise in construction, systems and window/door installation sectors.
ABOUT.INTRO_PARAGRAPH2: The company is composed of specialized professionals able to manage every phase of the project, from technical design to final execution.
ABOUT.STORY_PARAGRAPH1: The creation of Guri Group represents a step toward the future, with the goal of offering complete and professional services.
ABOUT.STORY_PARAGRAPH2: We follow every project through all its phases, ensuring quality, coordination and reliable results.
ABOUT.STORY_PARAGRAPH3: We operate in construction, real estate and mobility with a practical and client-oriented approach.
ABOUT.VALUES_PARAGRAPH: The principles that guide every Guri Group activity.
ABOUT.VALUES_PROFESSIONALITY: Technical expertise and attention to detail.
ABOUT.VALUES_RELIABILITY: Reliability and transparency in every project.
